chunks.text: 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, AT KARACHI C. P. No. D-2099 of 2022 Present: Ahmed Ali M. Shaikh, CJ and Yousuf Ali Sayeed, J Petitioners: Ghayasuddin Qureshi & others through Maroof Hussain Hashmi, Advocate. Respondents: Nemo. Date of hearing: 14.04.2022. ORDER YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J. - Professing to be Office Bearers of the Meat Merchant Welfare Association, the Petitioners, have invoked the Constitutional jurisdiction of this Court impugning the Notification dated 18.03.2022 issued by the Commissioner, Karachi, notifying the price of Mutton in the local limits of Karachi Division and seeking that they be allowed to sell meat at a higher retail price, with the official functionaries being restrained from taking any coercive action against them in that regard. A perusal of the Petition reflects that the only ground advanced is that the Petitioners were not consulted prior to issuance of the impugned Notification. However, during the course of submission, learned counsel for the Petitioner could not point out any provision of law to substantiate the assertion that consultation with the Petitioners was necessary or otherwise advance any argument as to any defect in the impugned Notification justiciable under Article 199 of the Constitution. 2 In view of the foregoing, the case of the Petitioners appears to be misconceived and devoid of force, hence while granting the request for urgency, we dismiss the Petition in limine along with other pending miscellaneous applications. JUDGE CHIEF JUSTICE Karachi. Dated:
